UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific data like search stats and draft bills.

lastSearchDate.description: ISO string of the last search date.

billDraft.description: JSON stringified array of draft bill items.

SavedBill.title: SavedBill
SavedBill.description: A bill saved by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the saved bill.

items.description: JSON stringified array of bill items.

createdAt.description: ISO string of when the bill was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO string of when the bill was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles containing search stats and drafts.

/users/{userId}/savedBills/{billId}.description: Saved bills belonging to the user.
